node.constraint: Initialize better-sqlite3 database at path.resolve(process.cwd(), 'shop.db') lazily inside handlers (not at top level of the module to prevent import crashes). Create products table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, name TEXT, price REAL, description TEXT, image TEXT, category TEXT, rating REAL, reviewsCount INTEGER) if not exists. Seed with 10+ items if table is empty. Support GET and POST.

Create a professional products catalog view at app/products/page.tsx (styled with beautiful Tailwind grid). Fetch the products from '/api/products' on mount. Display them with product cards showing image, title, description, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button calling the cart addition logic via fetch POST request to '/api/cart'. Include a navbar linking to Home ('/') and Cart ('/cart').
